extraction_note: The provided source (Wikipedia article on McKids) documents the McDonald's clothing retail brand/chain (1987-2003+), not the M.C. Kids video game (1992). The source is off-topic for game design extraction. All design philosophy fields must be set to null pending access to actual game documentation (strategy guides, developer interviews, gameplay footage analysis, or game-specific wikis).
